Document:
# Act professionally as Command or Security Command and security roles are held to stricter interpretations of the rules. - These are not learning roles. Members of command and security must be competent and familiar with the rules. - Do not hinder or cause overall negative effects to the station or crew. - Do not abuse your power.
Command and security set the tone for the round - when they hold themselves to high standards, the rest of the station tends to follow.
## Examples Acceptable: - A captain confesses an embarrassing mistake over the station announcement. - Nuclear operatives are attacking, so command members arm themselves from the armory. - Command votes to demote a captain who is harming the station, and the head of security carries it out.
Prohibited: - A security officer accepts a bribe to ignore a crime or help a prisoner escape. - A captain declares that all contraband is legal, or sends troll messages over announcements. - Command or security use Syndicate items outside of extreme emergencies. - A command member hands out high-security access for no good reason.
